# Episode 42: Bounded Contexts in Practice

The hosts discuss practical modelling decisions in larger systems.
teaser: A practical conversation about finding useful boundaries in complex domains.
summary_long: This episode explains how teams can discover bounded contexts, notice model conflicts and decide where integration boundaries should live.
subtitle: A practical look at bounded contexts
